name: Public Joint-Stock Company TNS energo Nizhny Novgorod
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company TNS energo Nizhny Novgorod operates as an energy supply company in the Nizhny Novgorod region. The company serves approximately 34.9 thousand legal entities and 1.22 million individuals. Its clients include industrial enterprises, small and medium businesses, public sector institutions, and individuals. The company is based in Nizhny Novgorod, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company TNS energo Nizhny Novgorod is a subsidiary of Public Joint Stock Company Group of Companies TNS energo.
